data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. HODGEPODGE unwanted in betting but showed good early dash and led until late, finishing third and beaten 1.3 lengths (19.62) at this track in a Maiden over 350m. Top chance in this line up. 6. HELP NEEDED had second look this course and distance latest and improved on his time, finishing a 0.8 lengths second in 19.58. Looks a leading chance again. 2. NEVER GIVING UP was safely held on debut after settling well back when seventh (17.40) at this track over 300m. Expected to do much better this time. 3. SUZIE DARLING is in the mix despite finishing out of the placings here last start.","runners":[1,6,2,3],"exclusive":false}
